name: Beta Crystal
overview:
The galaxy is in chaos. Ruled over by the iron fist of the intergalactic warlord known only as Console, all planets quake in fear at his name.

Twins Xandr and Kayi set out to take down Console and free the entire universe from his grasp.

trailers.title: (Work In Progress) Beta Crystal Opening 1-Galatic Bond by Dima Lancaster
